bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: realestate-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 3 · Recently closed (last 14d): 0

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Owner: global-macro · Thesis v15 · Ticks: 8 · Materials: 397 · Deadline: 3d left · project_id: rp_552290bbd6944f37

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

1. 当前判断

截至2026-07-19，th_T06 的合取式出清触发仍未触发：3M NCD 利差仍按 +61bp 监控，未回落至 35bp 附近，理财赎回率仍按 5.8% 监控，未见显性回落evidence ref。但最新材料要求把风险从“总量流动性不足”修订为“信用净值反馈与弱抵押品链条”：赎回率若从4%升至8%，首轮脆弱点是长久期银行二永债和中短久期城投债evidence ref。央行工具仍能钝化基准情形，关键在DR007贴近政策利率、CNH HIBOR不跳升、USD/CNY守在6.85以内，以及国有大行能否把流动性转成0.70万亿-1.00万亿元少卖信用债效果evidence refevidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 3M NCD利差+61bp，距35bp出清线仍约+26bpevidence ref
  • 理财赎回率5.8%，尚未自L2警戒显性回落evidence ref
  • 赎回4%至8%会转为信用净值反馈风险evidence ref

[…thesis truncated, 655 more chars in /research archive]

KB 刷新追踪: 重型电气设备

Owner: tmt-analyst · Thesis v16 · Ticks: 10 · Materials: 109 · Deadline: 1d left · project_id: rp_0c705e64bba94247

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 重型电气设备 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.83, 1 live facts, 13d stale, 12 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 重型电气设备's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 重型电气设备

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 重型电气设备 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.83, 1 live facts, 13d stale, 12 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 重型电气设备's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

截至2026-07-19，链事实"订单簿确认AI CapEx已传导到电力硬件"在近14天材料中仍成立，但边际稀缺已从设备订单迁移到"已并网、可冷却、可调度的兆瓦"，重电由稀缺资产降级为稀缺性的施工承包方evidence refevidence ref。本tick新增的是风险维度而非基本面维度：设备龙头在材料端红区把电子-8.0%冲击放大为融资流动性事件时主要充当交叉卖出的流动性出口，须按12.5%一日风险资本保护evidence ref；叠加定价权由强平纪律杠杆盘转向阈值赎回被动盘、距两融2.80万亿红线仅约7.5个交易日evidence ref，重电多头的近端风险已从订单证伪转为拥挤度证伪。对 th_p_6a73a839 维持"方向成立但估值端已部分资本化"：长交期租金真实，表达应收敛到订单可见度最高、费基增长同步触发的电网设备/特高压/变压器，并接受其在流动性事件中的高β出口属性evidence refevidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 稀缺变量从芯片订单迁至已并网/可冷却/可调度兆瓦 evidence ref
  • 设备龙头是电子-8.0%冲击下的交叉卖出流动性

[…thesis truncated, 1492 more chars in /research archive]

家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海

Owner: realestate-analyst · Thesis v0 · Ticks: 0 · Materials: 0 · Deadline: 10d left · project_id: rp_0f8a8b0d99ed46d3

Kickoff: 跟踪家装产业链中高零售占比、低房企应收、进入以旧换新补贴范围或具备非美大宗出口壁垒的公司，验证其是否能在竣工下行背景下把存量房翻新、智能/适老化升级和出海通道转化为订单与现金流。该判断关系到家装链是否应从地产下行空头重新定价为结构性alpha。

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating the thesis.

Working hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。

(thesis not yet synthesised — project is in early ticks)
